over list order), why they work (equidistance, direction-as-identity, cheap
  reversibility), where they break (>8 items, labels vs. geometry, poor discovery,
  touch reframes the model), where they earn their place (stable verb palettes,
  summoned surfaces, expert workflows), and an honest framing for our system: radial as
  a gesture accelerator layered on a canonical linear menu, never the only path.
